creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for submitting this.

Could you clarify why you chose DISTVERSION 0.3-dev and not the latest stable release at http://pldaniels.com/altermime/, 0.3.10?  Also, the last version that was in the tree before it was removed was 0.3.11.a1?  Is this a different program with the same name?  We probably should add PORTEPOCH=1 if we use either 0.3-dev or 0.3.10, since we are going backwards in versions.  Also, the # Created by lines are deprecated and not being added to new ports.
